ADMIN_SOUL_IMAGE.description: Image used as the admin-soul pod's idle presence container (run as `sleep infinity`); the operator soul itself runs inside the shared Hermes, so this is only here to hold the pod open. Defaults to a stock minimal busybox image. Leave default unless running a fork PoC.

SERVICEBAY_MCP_URL.description: ServiceBay MCP control-surface URL the operator soul reaches with full-admin scopes (read+lifecycle+mutate). Reached via host loopback.

TZ.description: IANA time zone for log timestamps.
